aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite or recommend this business due to significant gaps in structured data, content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Create and publish an FAQ page with relevant HVAC questions and answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational with positive ratings but has inconsistencies with the website.
critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between GBP and website.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is weak due to mismatched phone numbers and missing address on the website.
action_items: Update the website with the correct phone number (407-317-5211).
Add the business address to the website footer or contact page.

schema_gaps: No structured data for services or products

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site invisible to AI.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Orlando, Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema and creating an FAQ page.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by fixing your site's invisibility to chatbots and search engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it overlooked by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema implementation, FAQ content creation, and NAP consistency to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing your potential market share—act now to catch up and lead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Fix Your Site's AI Visibility Gap Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical gaps that are preventing AI models from citing your business.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
nap_issues: Phone mismatch: Website has (407) 577-0691, GBP has (407) 317-5211
Address not found on website but listed on GBP
